package.name: mowgli_gnss_bridge
package.description: C++ port of the Universal GNSS topic bridge ("topic manager"). Subscribes to the internal universal_gnss_ros2 status/RTCM topics plus /diagnostics and republishes them onto the public Mowgli GNSS contract (mowgli_interfaces/GnssStatus and rtcm_msgs/Message). Behaviour-exact replacement for the Python universal_gnss_topic_bridge.py, moved into rclcpp to cut per-message interpreter overhead on the Raspberry Pi GNSS sidecar.
